name: [ES-CMP][V3] Create and Update Task from Work Request

reason.description: Present when execution_status is 'Failed'. Explains why the agent stopped.

task_id.description: The ID of the newly created task when execution_status is 'Task created successfully'.

campaign_id.description: The mapped campaign ID used to create the task.

cmp_task_url.description: The URL of the created CMP task when execution is successful.

description: create task from work request based on extracted work request metadata and update task metadata
prompt_template:
## Input 1. [[work_request_object]]​ is an object containing "proceed_status", "work_request_id", "template_name", "workflow_id", "workflow_name", "status", "assignee_name", "assignee_id", "campaign", "supporting_activity", "due_date", "channel", "task_title" 2. Define campaign_mapping_object : ``` { "[ES CMP] Test Campaign": "69228e01dc2727478b5f93ea", "[ES-CMP] Test Opal Usecase - Campaign": "6903266dd19827a999a72490", "Event: Test Campaign": "68f243baac75a43a53dfb70a", "Captives & Fronting (2025)": "6967c4318dbb9dc09d43b966", "Event: Baden Baden (2025)": "6967c3b18dbb9dc09d4342a6", "Event: RVS Monte Carlo (2025)": "692d9822465fe318491a02ef", "Financial & Structured Solutions (2025)": "6967c3ce8dbb9dc09d438c29", "Forward in Life (2025)" : "692d9845465fe318491a1a0c", "IP/PULSE & Network (2025)": "692d985c465fe318491a612c", "RDS Platform Overall (2025)": "6967c3ee8dbb9dc09d43a0fd", "RDS Property Exposure (2025)": "6967c4068dbb9dc09d43a95f", "Reinsurance Recalibrated (2025)": "692d9831465fe318491a062a" } ``` --- ## Process 1. let campaign_name = [[work_request_object]] ["campaign"] 2. call `create_task_from_work_request` with: 1. work_request_id = [[work_request_object]] ["work_request_id"] 2. title = [[work_request_object]]["task_title"] 3. campaign_id = campaign_mapping_object[campaign_name] 4. due_at = [[work_request_object]]​["due_date"] 5. owner_id = [[work_request_object]] ["assignee_id"] 6. workflow_id = [[work_request_object]] ["workflow_id"] 7. let task_id = newly_created_task_id 3. call `get_cmp_resource` with : 1. resource_type = "task" 2. resource_id = task_id 3. extract from output : 1. first_workflow_step_name 2. cmp_task_url 3. owner_email_address 4. call `update_task_substep` with : 1. task_id = task_id 2. step_name = first_workflow_step_name 3. assignee_type = "user" 4. assignee_name = [[work_request_object]] ["assignee_name"] 5. call `send_email` with: 1. recipient_emails = owner_email_address 2. cc_emails = ["[Neil.Mullarkey@optimizely.com](mailto:Neil.Mullarkey@optimizely.com)", "[suriya.disha@optimizely.com](mailto:suriya.disha@optimizely.com)", "[Nicola.Dack@optimizely.com](mailto:Nicola.Dack@optimizely.com)", "[mehreen.rahman@optimizely.com"](mailto:mehreen.rahman@optimizely.com)] 3. subject = "New Task Created from Work Request in CMP" 4. body = ```

Hi

Here is the link to the newly created task: {cmp_task_url}

Thank you!

``` 6. After all steps succeed, IF [[work_request_object]]​["supporting_activity"] is not null, return this object ``` { "execution_status": "Task created successfully", "task_id": task_id, "task_title": [[work_request_object]]​["task_title"], "campaign_id": campaign_id, "cmp_task_url": cmp_task_url, "supporting_activity": [[work_request_object]]​["Supporting Activity"], "work_request_id": [[work_request_object]]["work_request_id"], "owner_email_address": owner_email_address, "due_date": [[work_request_object]]["due_date"] } ``` ELSE, return this object ``` { "execution_status": "Task created successfully", "task_id": task_id, "campaign_id": campaign_id, "cmp_task_url": cmp_task_url } ``` 7. If any tool call fails, OR the returned task_id is null, OR any unexpected value occurs: call `send_email` with : 1. recipient_emails = owner_email_address 2. cc_emails = ["[Neil.Mullarkey@optimizely.com](mailto:Neil.Mullarkey@optimizely.com)", "[mehreen.rahman@optimizely.com](mailto:mehreen.rahman@optimizely.com)", "[Nicola.Dack@optimizely.com](mailto:Nicola.Dack@optimizely.com)", "[suriya.disha@optimizely.com](mailto:suriya.disha@optimizely.com)"] 3. subject = "Task creation failed in CMP" 4. body = ```

Hi,

The task creation process failed during execution. Please check workflow logs in Agent Builder.

" ``` 5. return {"execution_status": "Failed", "reason": "Task creation failed during execution."}
